All Bizarre Lineage Codes

Don't miss out on free Stat Point Essences and Rare Chests from the newest codes. We test and verify every single Bizarre Lineage code daily so you can maximize your rerolls without the hassle. Find all the latest active codes below and start dominating.

Active Bizarre Lineage Codes

!code 100kLikes
1 Stat Point Essence, 1 Rare Chest Active
!code 30kLikes
1 Stat Point Essence Active
!code shutdownwoops
1 Stand Stat Essence Active
!code 1week
1 Stand Personality Essence Active

* Remember: You MUST include the !code prefix exactly as shown above when claiming rewards in the chat box!

How to Redeem Bizarre Lineage Codes

1

Join the Community

Before doing anything, you must join the official 'Bizarre Collective' Roblox group and Like the game via the main page.

2

Launch the Game

Boot up Bizarre Lineage in Roblox and wait for your character to fully load into the server.

3

Open the Chat Box

Navigate to the top-left corner of your screen and click on the in-game text chat icon (or press '/').

4

Enter Final Code

Type the code exactly as written, including the !code prefix (e.g. !code 100kLikes), and hit Enter to claim!

Where Do Bizarre Lineage Codes Come From?

If you're wondering who makes these codes, they are handed out directly by MIDAS and the official development team. The devs drop new codes to celebrate huge community milestones (like hitting massive Like goals on the Roblox page), whenever there's a big content patch, or even if servers slam and they need to hand out apology compensation.

Want to hunt for them yourself? The two best official sources are the Bizarre Lineage Discord Server and the official Trello board. But honestly, watching Discord announcements all day is exhausting. Just bookmark our page instead — we do the heavy lifting for you.

Upcoming Bizarre Lineage Code Milestones

Developers usually drop a brand new Bizarre Lineage code whenever the game reaches a massive Like milestone on the official Roblox page. This means the community can actively work together to unlock the next code. Currently, the most anticipated code drop will occur at 200,000 Likes. Once that milestone is hit, a huge new code will be released, likely rewarding premium items. We will update this codes list the absolute second the new codes drop.

What are Stat Point Essences in Bizarre Lineage?

As you can see from our active codes list, developers are primarily handing out Stat Point Essences and Stand Personality Essences via these codes right now rather than just plain cash. These rewards from codes are crucial high-tier items that dictate your entire build.

A Stat Point Essence from a code allows you to respec and re-allocate points into Vitality, Strength, or specific Stand power scaling. Before using these highly coveted codes rewards, we highly recommend checking out our comprehensive Stand Tier List. Don't waste your precious Stat Essences maxing out scaling on a D-tier Stand! Make sure you have rolled something worthwhile like The World or Star Platinum before cashing these codes in.

Types of Rewards from Codes

✨

Stat Point Essence

Instantly grants points to allocate to your character's combat stats.

🧬

Stand Personality Essence

Used to reroll or modify your Stand's personality traits for hidden buffs.

🎁

Rare Chest

Open for a chance to get high-tier accessories, cash, or drop-exclusive items.

🏹

Stand Arrow

Use to roll for a random Stand. Higher rarity Stands have lower drop rates.

While You Wait for Bizarre Lineage Codes...

Make sure you are ready to use your rewards wisely. Check the tier list to know which Stand to keep, and browse our leveling guide to maximize your XP boosts.

Bizarre Lineage Tier List Browse All Stands Leveling Guide

Frequently Asked Questions

What are the latest active Bizarre Lineage codes working right now?

Yes! There are currently several active Bizarre Lineage codes giving out free Stat Point Essences, Stand Stat Essences, and Rare Chests. You can find our fully verified list of codes above.

How do I redeem my Bizarre Lineage codes?

To redeem any Bizarre Lineage code, you must first join the Bizarre Collective Roblox group and Like the game on the main page. Then, load into the game, open the chat box in the top-left corner, and type '!code ' followed by your chosen code (e.g. '!code 100kLikes'). Press enter to claim the code's reward.

Where is the best place to find new Bizarre Lineage codes?

Right here! We constantly monitor the official Bizarre Lineage Discord server and the Trello board to ensure this list of codes is updated the very second a new code drops. Save this codes page!

Do Bizarre Lineage codes expire?

Absolutely. Roblox game codes constantly expire after a few days or when a new major update drops. Bookmark our codes page to make sure you grab your Essences before these codes vanish.

Why isn't my Bizarre Lineage code working?

The most common reason a code fails is that you haven't joined the Roblox Group or Liked the game yet—this is a strict requirement for all codes. Alternatively, the code may have been typed without the '!code ' prefix, or the code has officially expired.
